column1: # Source: aligned with devsecops-poc + extras for REST/JWT APIs
# ── IGNORE — known false positives for this API ──────────────────────────────

column3: # Cookie No HttpOnly Flag (CSRF double-submit cookie must be JS-readable)
# Incomplete or No Cache-control Header (handled by SecurityHeadersMiddleware)
# X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing (we set it in SecurityHeadersMiddleware)
# Server Leaks Version Information (Server header removed by middleware)
# CSP Header Not Set (only on WAF 403 block pages we can't control)
# CSP: Wildcard Directive (we have strict CSP for API)
# Permissions Policy Header Not Set (only on WAF 403 block pages)
# Timestamp Disclosure (API returns ISO 8601 datetime fields by design)
# Session Management Response Identified (CSRF cookie, not session)
# Sec-Fetch-Dest Header Missing (ZAP's own requests lack this header)
# X-Frame-Options Header (we set DENY, but warn if ZAP disagrees)

column1: # ── FAIL — medium/high severity, blocks the build ────────────────────────────

column3: # Web Browser XSS Protection Not Enabled
# Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in URL
# Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in HTTP Referrer Header
# Cloud Metadata Potentially Exposed (SSRF → AWS metadata endpoint)
